pullRequest.title: [ursaluna-bloodmoon]: implement default form
pullRequest.body:
now `10441` is the default form for `ursaluna-bloodmoon`

Closes #1178

pullRequest.title: Fix: OpenAPI Schema for held_items
pullRequest.body:
This PR updates the `held_items` schema in the `PokemonDetail` response to correctly reflect it as an array of objects (not a single object), matching actual API responses.


Fixes #1247

pullRequest.title: Refactor: Removed GraphQL Prefixes
pullRequest.body:
## What's Done:
- Removed the 'pokemon_v2_' prefix from all relevant GraphQL table and relationship names within the Hasura metadata by setting custom names. 
- Updated example GraphQL queries.

Fixes: #1254

pullRequest.title: Fix form_order of Maushold
pullRequest.body:
Reorder form_order of Maushold: three=1, four=2

fixes #1296

pullRequest.title: fix(api): make Pokémon encounters query cross-database compatible
pullRequest.body:
This PR removes PostgreSQL-specific `DISTINCT ON` usage from the Pokémon encounters endpoint and replaces it with backend-agnostic queries.

Fixes:  #1374

pullRequest.title: fix: Rename region_id and base_form_id to region and base_form in evolution details
pullRequest.body: For consistency with other fields (e.g. trade_species_id → trade_species), evolution detail fields should omit the _id suffix. Updated both the serializer and openapi.yml. Fixes #1396

pullRequest.title: Fix: Expose endpoint with version/hash
pullRequest.body:
## What changed

Added a new `GET /api/v2/meta` endpoint that returns metadata about the currently deployed version of the API:

```json
{
  "deploy_date": "2024-01-15T12:34:56+00:00",
  "hash": "abc123def456...",
  "tag": "2.7.0"
}
```

- `deploy_date`: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest git commit (null if unavailable)
- `hash`: Full git commit hash (null if unavailable)
- `tag`: Git tag pointing at HEAD, if any (null if not tagged or unavailable)

## Why

Exposes version/hash information useful for cache invalidation — clients can check the `hash` field to determine whether to flush their cache after a new deploy.

Fixes #1432

## Testing

- Added `test_meta_api` to `pokemon_v2/tests.py` verifying the endpoint returns HTTP 200 with the expected `deploy_date`, `hash`, and `tag` fields.
- Ran existing tests (`test_gender_api`, `test_language_api`, `test_meta_api`) — all pass.

pullRequest.title: Add the pokedex_version_groups for more games
pullRequest.body:
Add the pokedex_version_groups for linking back dlc version groups to the main game version group. Scarlet and Violet and Legend ZA

Closes: #1448
